title: 😱 Recursive Dread Fields
name: Recursive Dread Fields
what_it_is: Emotional environments built from feedback loops of fear—each thought spawns more dread, creating a self-feeding atmosphere of collapse.
how_to_use: he moves through recursive dread—each footstep a loop of worsening future
she is followed by her own echo of fear, amplified by each reflection
animation_behavior: Scene darkens with repetition, shadows replicate, fear ripple grows with time or movement ---
